name: rivetos
description: RivetOS extensions for Grok Build — persistent cross-agent memory, high-quality recall discipline, and shared tooling with Claude Code + Hermes agents.

plugins.name: rivet-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory + recall discipline skill for Grok Build. Brings the same memory store used by rivet-claude and rivet-hermes, plus the battle-tested rules that make agents actually use it correctly on the first try.
